_provenance: Chapter 1 Phase B polish — replaces the standalone client_stance_menu.tscn modal with an in-dialogue option pick. The dialogue box renders the three choices under the prompt; the player picks with move_up/move_down + interact. Selected option renders in red (per dialogue_box.gd OPTION_COLOR_SELECTED).
_scope: Retired Session 27 (2026-05-13). The active Beat 8 stance choice now lives in halina.json::client_meeting_intro with chain:true options. This file is kept as a dormant compatibility stub because the old scene NPC id may still exist during transition work.

states._comment_retired: Retired Session 27 (2026-05-13). The stance choice now happens inside halina.json's client_meeting_intro state (chain:true options block). This state's trigger is set to an impossible condition so it never fires. The meeting_room_stance NPC in the scene can be left in place (idle_flavor is empty, so it produces the hardcoded '...' fallback if approached).
lines: How would you like to open with Mrs. Sikorska?

choices.text: Lead with how she's holding up.
